author: driver--design-phase-3-widgets-md-cfd8
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_widgets with 8 modules. Node struct stores NodeKind, Style, AccessibilityInfo, EventHandlers, children, key, and flex layout fields. Node is NOT Clone (D-11). All modifiers use builder pattern. Widget functions are free fns returning Node. IntoNode/IntoNodes with tuple macro up to 16. Callback is Rc-wrapped. Router uses provide_context/use_context with Signal for current path.
